full_quote: Kyle is a compassionate and skilled strategist focused on user experience. He knows how to navigate the complexities of social and cultural dynamics across the divides of screens, companies, and users. He has a vast array of experience, and is clearly driven by curiosity on how to improve interactions between users of tech products and their creators. I would highly recommend Kyle as a key hire for your projects.
